title: Fiji macro to calculate colocalisation between two point-like signals
author: Letort, Gaelle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Fiji macro. 
 Calculates colocalisation between two signals, based on Manders Coefficient (overlap area).  Signals should be round-ish (RNA points) so we use a difference of Gaussian filter to enhance it before thresholding. CLIJ2 is used to run the difference of gaussian.   Dependencies: CLIJ2 (it can be installed through the Update Site)
steps_raw:
Fiji macro. 
 Calculates colocalisation between two signals, based on Manders Coefficient (overlap area).  Signals should be round-ish (RNA points) so we use a difference of Gaussian filter to enhance it before thresholding. CLIJ2 is used to run the difference of gaussian.   Dependencies: CLIJ2 (it can be installed through the Update Site)
